topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Reuse existing Firefly and Postgres containers; adapt docker-compose.yml; expose Flow Finance AI via Traefik at financegnome.omniflow.cc with password middleware; verify it runs.
finance_goblin/docker-compose.yml, .env.example, optional docs; host stack /workdir/firefly/docker-compose.yml and /workdir/services (postgres) on network traefik.

Do not start new firefly-iii or postgres services; join external traefik network; Firefly container name firefly; postgres container postgres; port 8090 already used by firefly_product_manager on host.

docker compose --profile minimal up without duplicate Firefly/Postgres; GET /health on backend; HTTPS reachability via Traefik Host financegnome.omniflow.cc with auth middleware; Firefly API reachable from app container.
Compose documents external mode; operator .env lists required variables; smoke test passes on Debian host; user informed of any missing env values.
